requestBody.courseId: string (required, non-empty; id of an existing non-deleted course)

responseBody.fallbackReason: string | undefined (present only when source is "fallback")
responseBody.cached: boolean (true when served from the in-memory 5-min cache)

suggestions.trainerId: string (Trainer.id, guaranteed to exist and be conflict-free for the course date)
suggestions.name: string (Trainer.name)

backendSteps.purpose: Zod schemas: request body, the LLM's structured output, and the response DTO types.
keyDecisions: suggestRequestSchema = z.object({ courseId: z.string().trim().min(1) }) — mirrors zod style in schemas/course.ts.

llmSuggestionSchema validates model output: { trainerId, confidence 0-100, reasoning min 1, factors { subject, location, availability, experience } }; llmResponseSchema wraps { suggestions: array min 1 max 5 }.
Confidence coerced/rounded to integer and clamped 0-100 after parse; export inferred types SuggestRequest, TrainerSuggestion, SuggestResponse.

backendSteps.purpose: Server-only OpenRouter chat-completions client with retry/backoff. No Prisma, no business logic.
keyDecisions: chatCompletionJSON({ system, user }): POST https://openrouter.ai/api/v1/chat/completions, Bearer OPENROUTER_API_KEY, model OPENROUTER_MODEL, response_format json_object, temperature 0.2; returns parsed JSON of choices[0].message.content.
isConfigured(): boolean — true only when OPENROUTER_API_KEY is non-empty; service uses this to skip straight to fallback.
Retry: up to 2 retries (3 attempts) with backoff 500ms -> 1000ms (+/- 250ms jitter) for 429/5xx/network/20s-timeout; other 4xx and body-parse failures throw immediately as non-retryable.
Throws plain Error (never ApiError) — AI failure must never surface as an HTTP error because the service falls back; env read inside function, never NEXT_PUBLIC_*.

backendSteps.purpose: Orchestrator: load course + candidates, exclude conflicted trainers via conflictService, cache, call LLM, validate, fallback scorer.
keyDecisions: suggestTrainers(courseId): course via findFirst({ id, deletedAt: null }) else ApiError(404); trainers with select { id, name, subjects, location, rating, hourlyRate, _count.courses, availability }.

Conflict exclusion: detectConflicts per trainer via Promise.all; exclude ONLY on TRAINER_DOUBLE_BOOKED or TRAINER_UNAVAILABLE — LOCATION_OCCUPIED is about the venue, not the candidate, and would wrongly disqualify every trainer.

Cache: globalThis Map (pattern of lib/prisma) fingerprint -> { expiresAt, response }; fingerprint = SHA-256 of [courseId, course date/subjects/location/updatedAt, sorted candidates (id, subjects, location, rating, updatedAt, availability)]; TTL 5 min; lazy eviction; hits return cached: true.

AI path: if isConfigured() and candidates exist, compact prompt (course + per-candidate profile), model must return ONLY JSON { suggestions: [...] } 3-5 items ranked best-first; safeParse, drop suggestions whose trainerId is not in candidate set (anti-hallucination), join name from DB (never trust LLM name); <1 valid survivor = AI failure.

Fallback scorer (also on AI failure): score = round(50*subjectMatchRatio + 20*sameLocation + 15*(rating??3)/5 + 10*(availableWindowCoversDate?1:0.5) + 5*min(courseCount,5)/5) clamp 0-100; sort score desc, name asc, id asc; top 5, min 3 when available; factors/reasoning generated from same inputs; source fallback + fallbackReason.
createHandler({ POST }) — parse suggestRequestSchema, return await suggestTrainers(courseId); no try/catch (lib/api.ts owns errors).
No changes to pages/api/courses/[id].ts — courseUpdateSchema already accepts { trainerId, overrideConflicts } and PUT already returns 409 with conflicts.
POST not GET (triggers LLM work, cacheable server-side); empty candidate list returns 200 with suggestions: [].

frontendSteps.purpose: Self-contained ranked-suggestions panel with assign flow, mirroring Header.tsx conventions.
keyDecisions: Props: { courseId: string; onAssigned?: (trainerId: string) => void }; component fetches POST /api/trainers/suggest in useEffect keyed on courseId; state: { status loading|error|ready, data?, assigningId?, confirmConflicts? }.

Per suggestion (#1..#5): name, integer confidence with bar (outer bg-slate-200 rounded-full h-2, inner bg-gradient-to-r from-blue-500 to-purple-600 width %), reasoning text-gray-600, four factor rows (Subject/Location/Availability/Experience); source fallback -> amber notice (bg-amber-50 border-amber-300 text-amber-800) incl. fallbackReason.
States: loading = animate-pulse skeleton; error = message + Retry; empty = 'No suitable trainers found' card; errors read from { error, details? } envelope.

Assign: PUT /api/courses/${courseId} body { trainerId }; 2xx -> onAssigned; 409 -> parse details conflicts, inline confirm listing conflict messages with 'Assign anyway' (retry with overrideConflicts: true) / 'Cancel'; disable Assign buttons while assigning.
No new dependencies; slate/blue/purple palette, rounded-lg, shadow, transition.

frontendSteps.purpose: Mount TrainerSuggestions in the course management UI.
keyDecisions: Render <TrainerSuggestions courseId={...} onAssigned={refetch} /> behind a 'Suggest trainers' toggle in the course detail surface — LLM call only on demand, never per list row.
Smallest possible edit to this page; no restructuring of existing list logic.

conventionsSummary: Wrap every API route in createHandler from lib/api.ts; never hand-roll try/catch or error JSON in routes.
Throw ApiError(status, message, details?) from services; envelope is always { error, details? }.
Validate bodies with zod schemas in schemas/ (trim, min(1), explicit messages, z.coerce.date); schema.parse and let ZodError become 400.
Services own all Prisma access and return DTOs: Decimal -> Number, DateTime -> toISOString, date-only -> slice(0,10); routes stay thin.
Reuse detectConflicts from services/conflictService.ts with excludeCourseId; types TRAINER_DOUBLE_BOOKED | LOCATION_OCCUPIED | TRAINER_UNAVAILABLE.
OPENROUTER_API_KEY / OPENROUTER_MODEL from process.env server-side only; never NEXT_PUBLIC_.
Components: default-export arrow fn, self-contained fetching, Tailwind only, slate/blue/purple palette, no new npm deps.
Hot-reload-surviving singletons go on globalThis (lib/prisma.ts pattern).
Exclude soft-deleted courses (deletedAt: null) in every course query.
risks: LLM malformed JSON / hallucinated trainerIds — zod safeParse + clamp + candidate-id whitelist + deterministic fallback; builders must not skip the whitelist.
Per-trainer detectConflicts is O(N) queries — fine at seed scale; batch into one same-day query if trainer count grows; do NOT reimplement conflict logic.
In-memory cache is per-process (resets on redeploy/HMR, not shared across instances) — acceptable per spec; fingerprint must include updatedAt fields to bound staleness.
LOCATION_OCCUPIED trap: excluding on any conflict would disqualify all candidates when the venue is double-booked; filter trainer-specific types only.
OpenRouter worst-case latency (~45s with retries) — frontend loading state must tolerate it; timeout budget may need trimming.
Assign must send ONLY { trainerId } (+overrideConflicts on retry) so the partial PUT can't clobber fields; confidence is self-reported — present as relative ranking.
